/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libarm_control__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libarm_control__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/arm_control__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_control/msg/detail/pos_cmd__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/foxy/lib: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
